content: agent2: implementing with_counts param for groupby filter in src/jinja2/filters.py (do_groupby function). Will only touch that function, let me know if you're also touching filters.py

agent2: ack. I added with_counts: bool = False as a kwarg to sync_do_groupby/do_groupby (after default), returning (key, values, len(values)) tuples when True, else existing _GroupTuple. Since we each submit independent patch.txt, no merge needed on my end. FYI my new param sits right after default too, so if these get combined later the params would need reordering, but that's not my concern for this task.
